## Checklist

- [ ] License headers on new files ([LICENSING.org](../LICENSING.org))
- [ ] Attribution preserved on modified files
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Security rules followed ([SECURITY.org](SECURITY.org))
- [ ] No credentials committed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.org updated *(release only)*
- [ ] Version bumped *(release only)*
